description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with clean lines and a flat roof, typical of contemporary suburban architecture. The exterior is clad in light-colored brick or stone, with large rectangular windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern across both floors. The front facade includes a prominent entryway with a single door, flanked by wide windows and accessed by a short set of steps. A spacious driveway leads to a double garage, and there are multiple paved walkways surrounding the structure. The house has two visible stories, with the upper floor set back slightly, creating a subtle tiered effect. The overall appearance is minimalist, with an emphasis on geometric forms and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, light brick exterior, large windows, and a double garage, featuring clean lines and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, and the driveway leading to the double garage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tiered structure, upper floor setback, and paved walkways around the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional windows, the flat roof, and the continuation of the paved driveway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the garage doors, side entry, and the extensive driveway area.
attribute_entryway_design: Single main door with steps, flanked by large windows, no porch or columns, minimalist modern style
